data.description: ~250 cards, 1987-1991. Topps, Fleer, Donruss. Priced for someone who just wants a stack of cards.

data.shipping: Flat rate box or padded mailer depending on weight
data.notes: 250 cards is a meaningful bulk lot. Sell on quantity and era, not individual card value.

terms: junk wax baseball card lot 250 1987 1988 1989 topps fleer donruss

data.notes: 450-card binder sold $26, 750-card lot $43, 2500-card lots $40-50. $25 for 250 cards is fair and competitive.

data.title: 250 Baseball Card Bulk Lot 1987-1991 Topps Fleer Donruss Junk Wax Era Mixed
data.description:
Two hundred and fifty baseball cards from the junk wax era — 1987 through 1991, Topps, Fleer, and Donruss mixed throughout. Great for filling out sets, handing to a kid just getting into collecting, or sorting through for players you collect. No cherry picking here, just a solid stack of cards from the peak overproduction years.

Cards | ~250 total
Years | 1987-1991
Brands | Topps, Fleer, Donruss
Condition | Good overall
Notes | Mixed players and teams, unsorted

All my listings ship with free shipping for your ease, none of this $30 shipping on a 1 pound item. I price my listings fairly but please feel free to make an offer.

Sold As Is.
data.condition_field: ~250 cards, Good condition overall. Mix of Topps, Fleer, and Donruss from 1987-1991. Unsorted, mixed players and teams. Typical junk wax era handling — no major damage noted across the lot.
